# Field Definitions: AP Vendor OnCost Groups Form

The following is a list of field descriptions for the AP Vendor OnCost Groups form. Many of the descriptions include links to other topics that provide additional information about or related to the topic.

## On-Cost Group

Enter the on-cost group to associate with this subcontractor/vendor. For more information, see [Associating On-Cost Types with a Subcontractor](/en/vista/vista/accounting/accounts-payable/vendors/associate-on-cost-types-with-a-subcontractor-au-and-ca).
